EmailTemplate.description: Response to RAF referee to confirm when vouchers will be sent.
EmailTemplate.name: RAF - When (old process)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your RAF Enquiry
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Due to data protection, I am not able to confirm any details about another customer.
However, I can confirm that vouchers for a successful referral will be sent 28 days after your friends policy start date.
You may be able to get more detailed information by speaking directly to your friend.
If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to get in touch.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
